message.content:
Explore the @belt/tools package thoroughly:
1. Run all tests (vitest) and capture the results
2. Run typecheck (tsc) and capture any errors
3. Run lint (biome) and capture any issues
4. Check the build process works correctly
5. Identify the current state of all test files and their coverage

Focus on: packages/tools/
Report all failures, warnings, and issues found.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore the @belt/tools package by running all quality checks and tests. Let me start by understanding the project structure and then running the diagnostics.

input.description: Get current directory and list root contents
